chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3750 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 21.08.2025 Mr. Parkash Kumar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition and submits that he will approach the trial Court for bail. Order accordingly. The petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
